Container.Name: reddsaver
Container.Overview: Command line tool to download saved and upvoted media from Reddit. Supports images (JPG/PNG), GIFs, image galleries, and videos from Reddit, Imgur, Gfycat/Redgifs, Giphy, and YouTube.
Container.Description: Command line tool to download saved and upvoted media from Reddit. Supports images (JPG/PNG), GIFs, image galleries, and videos from Reddit, Imgur, Gfycat/Redgifs, Giphy, and YouTube.[br][br]Before starting, create a Reddit script app at https://www.reddit.com/prefs/apps and place a reddsaver.env file in your appdata directory with the following contents:[br][br]REDDSAVER_CLIENT_ID='your_client_id'[br]REDDSAVER_CLIENT_SECRET='your_client_secret'[br]REDDSAVER_USERNAME='your_username'[br]REDDSAVER_PASSWORD='your_password'

Config.Name: Data Directory
Config.Description: Directory where downloaded media will be saved.

Config.Name: AppData (Config)
Config.Description: Path to the appdata directory containing your reddsaver.env credentials file.
